mapper.select: select distinct OUT_EN_NAME as outTableNameEn from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= date(NOW()) and out_en_name is not null
select sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, DATA_TYPE as dataType from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= date(NOW()) group by DATA_TYPE

select out_en_name as outTableNameEn, out_cn_name as outTableNameCh, out_protocol as outProtocol, sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, case when DATA_TYPE = '1' then '接入' when DATA_TYPE = '2' then '处理' when DATA_TYPE = '3' then '入库' when DATA_TYPE = '4' then '集成' else DATA_TYPE end as dataType, PUSH_HOUR as pushHour, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') as createTime from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL 1 DAY) and DATA_TYPE = '2'
and upper(out_protocol) = upper(#{tableId})
and PUSH_HOUR is not null group by DATA_TYPE, PUSH_HOUR, out_en_name, out_cn_name, out_protocol, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') union all select out_en_name as outTableNameEn, out_cn_name as outTableNameCh, out_protocol as outProtocol, sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, case when DATA_TYPE = '1' then '接入' when DATA_TYPE = '2' then '处理' when DATA_TYPE = '3' then '入库' when DATA_TYPE = '4' then '集成' else DATA_TYPE end as dataType, PUSH_HOUR as pushHour, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') as createTime from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL 1 DAY) and DATA_TYPE = '1' and upper(in_protocol) in ( select distinct in_protocol from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where upper(out_protocol) = upper(#{tableId}) ) and PUSH_HOUR is not null group by DATA_TYPE, PUSH_HOUR, out_en_name, out_cn_name, out_protocol, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d')

select out_en_name as outTableNameEn, out_cn_name as outTableNameCh, out_protocol as outProtocol, sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, CONCAT(STORE_TYPE, '>', PROJECT_NAME) as storageLocation, PUSH_HOUR as pushHour, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') as createTime from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL 1 DAY) and PUSH_HOUR is not null and DATA_TYPE = '3' and PROJECT_NAME is not null
and upper(in_protocol) = upper(#{tableId})
group by CONCAT(STORE_TYPE, '>', PROJECT_NAME), PUSH_HOUR, out_en_name, out_cn_name, out_protocol, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') order by PUSH_HOUR
select ID as id, name, THRESHOLD_VALUE as thresholdValue from DGN_COMMON_SETTING where PARENT_ID = 'dataVolumeMonitor' and name is not null

select out_en_name as outTableNameEn, out_cn_name as outTableNameCh, out_protocol as outProtocol, sum(OUT_SUCCESS_NUM) as outSuccessSum, sum(OUT_ERROR_NUM) as outErrorSum, case when DATA_TYPE = '1' then '接入' when DATA_TYPE = '2' then '处理' when DATA_TYPE = '3' then '入库' when DATA_TYPE = '4' then '集成' else DATA_TYPE end as dataType, PUSH_HOUR as pushHour, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') as createTime from SHPTSTATISTICS.SJGC_DATA_SUMMARY where CREATE_TIME >= DATE_SUB(date(NOW()), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) and DATA_TYPE != '4' and PUSH_HOUR is not null and out_en_name is not null group by DATA_TYPE, PUSH_HOUR, out_en_name, out_cn_name, out_protocol, DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_TIME, '%Y%m%d') order by PUSH_HOUR
